definitions: A small, arboreal, New World monkey of the family Callitrichidae, native to Central and South America, typically having soft fur, a long tail, and claws instead of nails on all digits except the big toe.
Any of several species of small, long-tailed, South American monkeys of the genus Callithrix and related genera, often kept as pets.
examples: The marmoset clung to the branch.
Marmosets are known for their small size.
A group of marmosets chattered in the trees.
